title: ADDICTION RECOVERY PEER MENTORING SERVICES - 211info
text: O'ROURKE CENTER ADDICTION RECOVERY PEER MENTORING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers peer mentoring services for substance use disorders. Mentors help clients to find housing, employment, applying for benefits such as TANF and OHP, guidance about legal aid programs, and transportation to recovery-oriented meetings and events. Also offers 12-step meetings and recovery-related activities and events, including dances, barbecues, poetry nights, and movie nights. 362 SW Oak Street Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Individuals age 18-35 with substance use issues. Clients can be currently in treatment, just leaving treatment, or at any other stage of their recovery process. Hours: 7 days per week 2pm-10pm Email (971) 703-4623 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 703-4623 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information. Visit website to fill out a referral form. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Online referral form AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Substance Use Disorder Issues General Addictions/Substance Use Disorder Support Groups Job Finding Assistance * Substance Use Disorder Issues Substance Use Disorder Drop In Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. O'ROURKE CENTER
